summary: Frontend E2E for Team League, Rewards, Profile Completion, Reports Export. All 14 acceptance items PASS. Verified sidebar nav (team-league, rewards), Team League page (6 tiers, 4 team rows, 'Your team' chip), Rewards store (4 cards, XP balance chip), member RBAC (no Add Reward / manage tab), admin CRUD flow (add reward via modal → new card visible → cleanup delete OK), Profile completion widget + edit form, Reports ExportBar visibility (hidden for member, visible for leader/admin), CSV download triggers GET /api/exports/team-performance?format=csv → 200. Mobile 375x812 layouts stack correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Rewards.jsx load() re-triggers on isAdmin change but isAdmin is stable per session - benign.
Reports.jsx ExportBar uses window.alert on failure - consider toast for consistency.
download() in Reports.jsx doesn't show loading state; large exports may appear frozen to user.
